signals.headline: Cooper Flagg exits Mavericks' rookie-season finale with left ankle sprain | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg exits Mavericks' rookie-season finale with left ankle sprain | NO | HIGH confidence**  
No. 1 overall pick Cooper Flagg (Dallas Mavericks) left Sunday's regular-season finale against the Chicago Bulls early due to a left ankle sprain after 9 minutes (10 points, 4 rebounds, 1 assist), ending his standout rookie campaign without playoffs.[1][4]
